2 · Brand structure — the variant under any brand palette

Only the accent roles re-skin; the fixed canvas + ink stay legible under every brand.

Brand roles: --brand-primary--brand-secondary--brand-accent--brand-on-accent — accents only. Canvas & ink are fixed literals (never re-skinned).
